trigger_conditions: Backend running but API endpoints returning 404

technical_details.actual_issue: Posts router not properly mounted at expected path

configuration_mismatch.websocket_expectations: Frontend expects ws://localhost:3000/ws but server disabled WebSocket
configuration_mismatch.sse_expectations: Frontend expects /api/events/stream but server provides different endpoints

claude_success_failure_analysis.original_task: Implement Agent Feed with real-time connections and posts display
claude_success_failure_analysis.calculation: (User Success Rate: 0 / Claude Confidence: 1.0) * TDD Factor: 0.3 = 0.15

identified_fixes.issue: Posts router not accessible at expected path
identified_fixes.fix: Verify posts router is properly mounted at /api/v1/posts

identified_fixes.issue: Base URL mismatch between frontend expectations and backend reality
identified_fixes.fix: Update frontend API service to use correct endpoint paths

identified_fixes.issue: Frontend trying to connect to disabled/non-existent WebSocket endpoints
identified_fixes.fix: Update connection logic to use available SSE endpoints or disable real-time features

identified_fixes.issue: Database imports failing causing route handlers to crash
identified_fixes.fix: Fix database connection imports in route handlers

recommended_test_patterns: API contract testing between frontend and backend

prevention_strategies.description: Define API contracts before implementation to prevent endpoint mismatches
Automated tests that verify frontend-backend communication paths
Comprehensive testing of real-time connection scenarios
Validate API base URLs and route mounting configuration at startup
